name: CARD Act Ability to Pay
outcome: Gated two-step chain for CARD Act ability-to-pay compliance. Step 1 evaluates ATP per §1026.51 (DTI threshold 45%, under-21 income restriction, penalty fee safe harbor $32/$43). Gate: atp_passes=true exits immediately (approved). Failed ATP continues to Step 2: adverse action notice build per Reg B §1002.9 with SHAP-ranked factor codes. CFPB $8 late fee rule vacated January 17, 2025 (Fifth Circuit No. 24-10266); $32/$43 remain in effect.
